ALEX RIVERA SUMMARY Senior Fullstack Engineer | System Architecture | Cloud + DevOps | 10 years Philippines (Remote) alex.rivera@example.test +63 917 111 2233 github.com/alexrivera linkedin.com/in/alexrivera Senior Fullstack Engineer with 10 years of experience across platform architecture, reliable backend services, and practical frontend delivery. I modernize legacy codebases, design scalable web systems, and ship production-ready platforms end to end across frontend, backend, and infrastructure. Strong in React and TypeScript, Node.js APIs, PostgreSQL, Terraform, CI/CD, and AWS and Azure patterns, with a track record delivering remotely across teams in multiple regions. I prioritize maintainability, performance, and predictable execution. CORE SKILLS React · TypeScript · Vite · Next.js · Tailwind CSS v4 · Design Tokens · TanStack Query (React Query) · Zustand · Node.js · Express · REST APIs · PostgreSQL · Redis · WebSockets · Docker · Terraform · GitHub Actions · AWS (ECS, S3, RDS, ECR, EC2, Route 53) · Azure (ADF/ADLS exposure) · Observability (Grafana/Prometheus/Loki) · Architecture (feature-based, modular, layered/Clean, event-driven) EXPERIENCE NORTHSTAR PAY — Senior Software Engineer (Full-time) Modernizing a legacy React frontend for an enterprise operations platform. Tech: React · NestJS · TypeScript · Vite · Tailwind v4 · TanStack Query · Zustand · Vitest · ESLint/Prettier · Husky · Biome. • Upgraded core stack: React 17 to 19, TypeScript modernization, CRA to Vite, and SASS to Tailwind v4 with token-based design system to reduce build friction and enable faster iteration. • Re-architected into feature-based modules with reusable hooks/components to improve change isolation and parallel development. • Migrated state/data patterns from Redux to TanStack Query plus Zustand using cache-first query key strategy and structured invalidation. • Implemented token-driven UI for consistent styling and scalable theming. • Raised quality bar with linting, formatting, tests, and commit hooks to reduce regressions. • Decomposed a legacy frontend monolith into smaller maintainable modules, improving separation of concerns and reducing average file size. DATAFORGE AI — Software Engineer (Part-time) Improved reliability and usability of a chat-driven analytics product. Tech: React · TypeScript · Data Visualization · Reliability Patterns · Workflow UI (node-based) · Analytics UX. • Expanded in-chat analytics rendering to support advanced charts (heatmaps, treemaps, stacked bars) for exploratory analysis. • Implemented retry and recovery flow for long-running requests to reduce dropped responses and improve perceived reliability. • Delivered Agents V1 orchestration UI (node-based workflow builder: Data Source, Prompt, Condition, Recipient) as foundation for automation UX. BRIGHTRIDGE DIGITAL — Senior Software Engineer to DevOps Engineer (Full-time) Fullstack-to-DevOps progression supporting web services, CI/CD, and reliability. Mar 2022 to Oct 2024 | Remote (New South Wales, Australia). May 2025 to Nov 2025 | Remote (California, United States). Feb 2025 to Present | Remote (Arizona, United States). Earlier roles: Front-end Lead Software Engineer, Web Software Developer, and Fullstack JavaScript Developer. PRODUCT ENGINEERING (SELECTED WORK) CAFEGRID — Multi-tenant Cafe OS Tech: AWS (ECS/S3/RDS) · Terraform · Docker · Grafana/Prometheus/Loki · Next.js · React · PostgreSQL/MySQL. • Delivered incremental modernization of a legacy product while managing production risk. • Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure automation with Terraform and Docker, improving release repeatability and reducing manual operations. • Supported production observability with Grafana/Prometheus/Loki for monitoring, logging, and diagnostics. • Contributed to analytics pipeline enablement with the data team. Additional stack usage: TypeScript · React · Node.js/Express · Drizzle ORM · WebSockets · Clean Architecture with dependency injection. • Led frontend structure and UI delivery; improved maintainability and feature scalability. • Optimized data fetching and added error tracking and analytics instrumentation. Freelance history (2014 to 2017): lead generation support, executive assistant support, graphic design, and web development gigs. Systems delivered in early beta with active users in the Philippines: QR customer ordering with live order status, merchant operations (order management, POS checkout, shift/cash drawer flow, refunds/voids), kitchen KDS with live ticket updates, menu engine (categories/items/modifiers/variants/templates), inventory tracking (ingredients/recipes/stock adjustments/suppliers/POs), loyalty points and stamps, and multi-tenant real-time propagation with idempotent consistency flows from orders to inventory to loyalty.
